code:
value Item
  name: String
  price: Int
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let cart = [
    Item(name: "apple", price: 120),
    Item(name: "bread", price: 300),
    Item(name: "cheese", price: 480),
  ]
  mut subtotal = 0
  for it in cart
    subtotal = subtotal + it.price
  end
  let total = if subtotal >= 500
    subtotal - 100
  else
    subtotal
  end
  println("subtotal=#{subtotal}")
  println("total=#{total}")
end
